item.title: QXO Stock Is Soaring Pre-Market Today — What Is Fueling The Surge?
item.description: The company will pay $2 billion in cash and 13.2 million shares, with QXO expecting the Kodiak transaction to close in the second quarter of 2026.

item.title: Tom Lee Explains MrBeast Could Be ‘Robinhood, Sofi, Chime Combined’ And Why That’s Good News For Bitmine
item.description: Tom Lee said Bitmine’s $200 million investment in MrBeast could evolve into a financial platform that captures Gen Z and Gen Alpha, reaping boons for ...

item.title: Centrus Taps Fluor For Major Ohio Uranium Expansion Amid Nuclear Fuel Push
item.description: Centrus said its subsidiary, American Centrifuge Operating LLC, signed a long-term agreement with Fluor to handle engineering, procurement, and constr...

item.title: Why Did Vertiv Stock Surge 12% Pre-Market Today?
item.description: For 2026, Vertiv expects revenue between $13.25 billion and $13.75 billion, implying organic growth in the range of 27% - 29%.

item.title: Why Did Vertiv Stock Surge 12% Pre-Market Today?
item.description: For 2026, Vertiv expects revenue between $13.25 billion and $13.75 billion, implying organic growth in the range of 27% - 29%.
